channel.title: Resource on emsenn.net
channel.description: Recent content in Resource on emsenn.net

item.title: Resource Manager
item.description:
Resource Manager Architecture

Controls quotas, fairness, and throttling using measurement data and policy.

Dependencies

  • Measurement Algebra: provides metrics (CPU time, entropy change, etc.).
  • Policy Simulation: defines quotas/limits per module or tenant.
  • Scheduling Simulation: enforces throttling via task prioritization.
  • Measurement Fabric Simulation: supplies a unified telemetry bus and schema registry for usage metrics.
  • Topology Integration Simulation: indicates placement/affinity constraints that inform resource quotas.
  • Traceability & Knowledge Service: ensures quota/policy decisions cite the earned acts supporting them.

Components

  1. Metric Collector.
    Aggregates observables from modules via the measurement fabric, ensuring all metrics conform to registered schemas.
